3031830.name: Llamalandia Demo
3031830.description:
In Llamalandia you play as a cute Llama that got lost in the mountains, prepare yourself to explore a new world that you have never seen before, while you embark on a magical journey across the Bolivian Altiplano, facing many challenges to find your family and save the rest of your species.

Features:


  • Cute llamas that will help you on your journey.
  • Build your llama sanctuary to protect your family.
  • Alpacas, armadillos, and other cute animals from the altiplano.
  • A magical world that you have never seen before.
3031830.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
